requirement_topic.en: Cordless Tool Battery Pack, Charger, and Power Supply
requirement_topic.zh: 无绳工具电池包、充电器与电源
requirement_topic.zht: 無繩工具電池包、充電器與電源

summary.en: Cordless tools should be assessed as a system. Low-voltage battery-only tool bodies may sit outside some EESS voltage thresholds, while mains chargers and external power supplies commonly require electrical safety and ACMA EMC review. Battery pack evidence should address the marketed pack, charger compatibility, markings, instructions, and transport or safety records where relevant.
summary.zh: 无绳工具应作为系统评估。仅电池低压供电的工具本体可能不在部分 EESS 电压阈值内，而市电充电器和外置电源通常需要电气安全和 ACMA EMC 审查。电池包证据应覆盖实际销售电池包、充电器兼容性、标识、说明书以及适用的运输或安全记录。
summary.zht: 無繩工具應作為系統評估。僅電池低壓供電的工具本體可能不在部分 EESS 電壓門檻內，而市電充電器和外置電源通常需要電氣安全和 ACMA EMC 審查。電池包證據應覆蓋實際銷售電池包、充電器相容性、標識、說明書以及適用的運輸或安全記錄。

standards_or_laws: State and territory electrical safety legislation applying EESS duties
AS/NZS 62841 series [voluntary cordless-tool safety evidence route]
Applicable AS/NZS charger, battery, and EMC standards [voluntary evidence route]

summary.en: China files often treat the battery pack as an accessory to the GB 3883 tool report, with separate lithium battery transport or cell safety evidence. Australia review still needs the charger, external power supply, and battery pack mapped to local electrical safety, EMC, marking, and instruction expectations.
summary.zh: 中国文件通常将电池包作为 GB 3883 工具报告的附件，并另附锂电池运输或电芯安全证据。澳大利亚审查仍需将充电器、外置电源和电池包映射到当地电气安全、EMC、标识和说明书要求。
summary.zht: 中國文件通常將電池包作為 GB 3883 工具報告的附件，並另附鋰電池運輸或電芯安全證據。澳洲審查仍需將充電器、外置電源和電池包映射到當地電氣安全、EMC、標識和說明書要求。

standards_or_laws: China lithium battery safety and transport evidence where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is missing charger and battery-pack linkage: cells, pack protection, charger limits, plug type, instructions, representative model coverage, and EMC configuration are not tied to the Australian SKU.
gap.zh: 常见差距是缺少充电器与电池包之间的关联：电芯、包保护、充电器限值、插头类型、说明书、代表型号覆盖和 EMC 配置未绑定到澳大利亚 SKU。
gap.zht: 常見差距是缺少充電器與電池包之間的關聯：電芯、包保護、充電器限值、插頭類型、說明書、代表型號覆蓋和 EMC 配置未綁定到澳洲 SKU。

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: applicable electrical safety and ACMA laws for in-scope chargers, power supplies, and regulated equipment. AS/NZS 62841 and related AS/NZS battery or charger standards are voluntary evidence routes.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：适用充电器、电源及受管设备须符合电气安全和 ACMA 法律。AS/NZS 62841 及相关 AS/NZS 电池或充电器标准是自愿证据路径。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：適用充電器、電源及受管設備須符合電氣安全和 ACMA 法律。AS/NZS 62841 及相關 AS/NZS 電池或充電器標準是自願證據路徑。

cn.en: China tool, battery, or transport evidence does not automatically satisfy Australian charger, EMC, RCM, and supply-chain duties.
cn.zh: 中国工具、电池或运输证据不会自动满足澳大利亚充电器、EMC、RCM 和供应链义务。
cn.zht: 中國工具、電池或運輸證據不會自動滿足澳洲充電器、EMC、RCM 和供應鏈義務。

compliance_verdict.en: Not Australia-ready for cordless tools until the battery pack, charger, external power supply, and tool body are scoped separately and supported by Australian electrical safety, ACMA EMC, marking, and instruction evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: 对于无绳工具，在电池包、充电器、外置电源和工具本体分别界定范围，并由澳大利亚电气安全、ACMA EMC、标识和说明书证据支持前，不能视为澳大利亚就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: 對於無繩工具，在電池包、充電器、外置電源和工具本體分別界定範圍，並由澳洲電氣安全、ACMA EMC、標識和說明書證據支援前，不能視為澳洲就緒。
